mdRecord.dcterms:title: Fiduciary Accounts: Guardianship of Cynthia W. Hylton, Formerly Robertson
mdRecord.dcterms:description: Guardianship of Cynthia W. Hylton, Formerly Robertson George W. Weddle, Guardian, Until 10.12.1886 William R. Hylton, Married Cynthia Robertson and the same day qualified to be her second guardian 10.12.1886 Recorded in Ledger Book 3, page 54, in Floyd County Courthouse
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Court Records
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
